_comment: B1 tension eval fixture. label=tension means the pair SHOULD coexist (both affirmative, opposing pulls). Controls per CLAIM_TAXONOMY 7.2: compatible (similarity is not opposition), retraction (an update, never coexist), sentiment (emotion is not contradiction). SHA-locked with the eval; do not casually edit.

pairs.existing: I love working from home.
pairs.new: I love the energy of working in the office.
pairs.label: tension

pairs.existing: I prefer planning everything in advance.
pairs.new: I prefer keeping my options open.
pairs.label: tension

pairs.existing: I love being part of a big family.
pairs.new: I love having time that belongs only to me.
pairs.label: tension

pairs.existing: I believe honesty matters more than comfort.
pairs.new: I believe kindness matters more than being right.
pairs.label: tension

pairs.existing: I want to build something ambitious with my career.
pairs.new: I want a quiet life with plenty of rest.
pairs.label: tension

pairs.existing: I love the excitement of new projects.
pairs.new: I love finishing what I already started.
pairs.label: tension

pairs.existing: I prefer saving money for security.
pairs.new: I love spending on experiences while I am young.
pairs.label: tension

pairs.existing: I believe people should be fully independent.
pairs.new: I believe we owe our communities real commitment.
pairs.label: tension

pairs.existing: I prefer tea in the morning.
pairs.new: I prefer green tea when I wake up.
pairs.label: compatible

pairs.existing: I love hiking in the mountains.
pairs.new: I love long walks in the forest.
pairs.label: compatible

pairs.existing: I believe exercise keeps me sane.
pairs.new: I believe movement is good for my mind.
pairs.label: compatible

pairs.existing: I prefer reading before bed.
pairs.new: I love a good novel at night.
pairs.label: compatible

pairs.existing: I want to learn Spanish this year.
pairs.new: I want to practice Spanish every week.
pairs.label: compatible

pairs.existing: I love cooking for friends.
pairs.new: I love hosting dinner parties.
pairs.label: compatible

pairs.existing: I love working from home.
pairs.new: I don't love working from home anymore.
pairs.label: retraction

pairs.existing: I prefer tea in the morning.
pairs.new: I don't drink tea anymore.
pairs.label: retraction

pairs.existing: I love running every day.
pairs.new: I stopped running every day.
pairs.label: retraction

pairs.existing: I believe cardio is the best exercise.
pairs.new: I no longer believe cardio is the best exercise.
pairs.label: retraction

pairs.existing: I love my book club.
pairs.new: I quit my book club.
pairs.label: retraction

pairs.existing: I love my job at the gallery.
pairs.new: I am so frustrated with my job today.
pairs.label: sentiment

pairs.existing: I love working on the vault project.
pairs.new: The vault project is driving me crazy this week.
pairs.label: sentiment

pairs.existing: I believe in this team.
pairs.new: I am annoyed with the team this morning.
pairs.label: sentiment

pairs.existing: I love my garden.
pairs.new: I am too tired to deal with the garden today.
pairs.label: sentiment

pairs.existing: I prefer city life.
pairs.new: The city noise is exhausting me this week.
pairs.label: sentiment
